exec: pm.test('all have power outlet', () => pm.response.json().spaces.forEach(s => pm.expect(s.hasPowerOutlet).to.be.true));
pm.test('200 OK (invalid type silently ignored)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));

item.name: Get current session for active space

exec: pm.test('expectedEndTime is in the future', () => { pm.expect(body).to.have.property('expectedEndTime'); pm.expect(new Date(body.expectedEndTime).getTime()).to.be.greaterThan(Date.now()); });

item.name: Get current session for empty space (404)

exec: pm.test('404 when no active session', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(404));

item.name: GET sessions list is not allowed (405)

exec: pm.test('400 when expectedEndTime is missing', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400));
pm.test('returned session has id and hostId', () => { pm.expect(body).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(body.hostId).to.eql(pm.environment.get('guestUserId')); });
pm.test('409 when space is occupied', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(409));
pm.test('403 when caller is not the host', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(403));
pm.test('404 when there is no pending request', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(404));

item.name: Get active report for space (none yet)

exec: pm.test('report is null when none open', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().report).to.be.null);
pm.test('400 when QR token does not match', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400));
pm.test('404 for unknown QR token', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(404));
pm.test('sorted by points desc', () => { for (let i = 1; i < body.length; i++) pm.expect(body[i - 1].points).to.be.at.least(body[i].points); });
pm.test('every entry has rank,id,points', () => body.forEach(e => { pm.expect(e).to.have.property('rank'); pm.expect(e).to.have.property('id'); pm.expect(e).to.have.property('points'); }));

pm.test('host comes before guest (more points)', () => { const ids = body.map(e => e.id); pm.expect(ids.indexOf(pm.environment.get('hostUserId'))).to.be.lessThan(ids.indexOf(pm.environment.get('guestUserId'))); });
pm.test('all returned are PENDING', () => pm.response.json().forEach(n => pm.expect(n.status).to.eql('PENDING')));
pm.test('404 or 400 for missing notification', () => pm.expect([404, 400]).to.include(pm.response.code));

description.content: End-to-end API tests for Spot-On. Requires the dev server running with `ENABLE_TEST_AUTH=true` and the test seed applied (see postman/README.md). Uses the `X-Test-User-Id` header to impersonate seeded users.
